pickipediareleases-desc: Provides a Release: namespace where page titles are IPFS CIDs. Automatically displays pin status, backlinks, and optional metadata.
pickipediareleases-api-desc: List all releases (CIDs from page titles) with optional metadata
apihelp-releaselist-summary: List all releases with their IPFS CIDs (from page titles) for pinning service synchronization
